title: Verify exact budget arithmetic
preconditions: Property generators and fixtures cover exact positive, zero, negative-refund, omitted, uncategorized, boundary, and high-scale ZAR values.
steps: Exercise every arithmetic and bucket-accounting invariant in NFR-BUDGET-EXACT-FINANCIAL-INTEGRITY across generated plan and LEDGER actual combinations.
expected: Every amount round-trips exactly; every entry and actual is counted once; all plan, actual, Remaining, and Over equations reconcile with zero floating-point drift.
